caption:

caption:

caption:
Comment "VIDEO" to get this AI that can create Long-form Videos In minutes.

You can now build entire YouTube channels. With one AI tool.

It's called VidRush. The world's first AI tool. It turns simple text prompts into full 1-hour-long documentary videos. All on its own.

You give it a video idea. Like "AI tools for no-code apps." It researches. Writes a complete script. Easy.

Then it scans the internet. Finds real-world footage that fits your story. Can't find the right clip? It makes custom motion graphics. Fills the gap. Perfect.

From there. Voiceover added. Text pops up. Transitions flow. Sound effects kick in.

Finally. Everything loads into an editing timeline. Adjust any part. Just chat with it. Say "Shorten the intro." Done.

Your long-form video. Ready to upload.

I tried it last week. Asked for a doc on Jammu tech startups. Typed the idea. Got a 45-minute video in under an hour. Script nailed local facts.

Footage mixed stock clips with AI graphics. Like having a full crew. But faster than ordering chai.

Why does this work so well? Because VidRush handles the hard parts. Research. Like a librarian on speed. Footage hunt. Like a pro scout.

Editing. Like your best friend with tweaks.

Chances are, if you love making videos, you'll:

 1. Post more often
 2. Grow your channel faster
 3. Spend less time grinding

Think of it this way. Building videos used to be like climbing a mountain. Now? A quick walk in the park. Prompt. Wait. Upload.

Perfect for folks like us in tech. Scaling AI content. No camera needed. Just ideas.

caption:
Comment "MARKTING" to get this New Free AI Marketing Agent by Google.

Google just released Pomelli, a new AI tool that automates your entire marketing—and it’s free. You start by pasting in your website link.

The AI scans everything: your text, images, colors, fonts, and overall style. It creates a “Business DNA” profile so it truly understands your brand voice and look.

Then, Pomelli gets to work. It generates multiple campaign ideas tailored specifically to you. These aren’t just generic suggestions. 

They are crafted based on your brand identity and what fits your audience. You can pick a campaign that suits your goals or type in a prompt if you already have an idea.

What’s cool? Pomelli creates all the content for you. That means captions, posts, headlines, and visuals—ready to go.

And all these assets are editable. You can tweak the text, swap images, or change layouts right inside the platform. No need for design skills or a big marketing team.

For example, if you run a small online store, Pomelli can make social media posts, ads, and web banners that match your product style.

Or if you’re a local service like a salon, it helps create promotional content for events or special offers.

The best part? Pomelli saves you tons of time and effort. Instead of juggling brainstorming, writing, and designing, you get polished, consistent marketing assets in minutes. It’s like having a marketing department in a box.

This tool lowers the barrier for small brands and creators to produce professional marketing campaigns that stay true to their unique style.

No more hours wasted or expensive agencies needed. Pomelli makes creating consistent, on-brand content easy and accessible for everyone.

In short, paste your website, get your brand’s DNA, choose or create campaigns, then edit and share your new marketing assets—all free and straightforward. This could change how small businesses handle marketing forever.
